name: @arnavpadwal/pi-skills-onboarding
description_en: Onboarding skill for pi — analyzes a project and produces a comprehensive context document covering architecture, dependencies, code structure, configuration, and development workflow
description_zh: pi的入门技能 — 分析项目并生成涵盖架构、依赖项、代码结构、配置和开发工作的综合上下文文档
